title: Diagnostic Checks Applied to Residuals
description: A flowchart illustrating the sequential process of checking a time series model's residuals for assumptions like independence, constant variance, and normality.
relationships: Residuals are first checked for autocorrelation via ACF/PACF and the Ljung-Box test
If independent, residuals are then checked for homoscedasticity via a residuals vs. fitted plot
If constant variance, residuals are finally checked for normality via a histogram/Q-Q plot and the Shapiro-Wilk test
Passing all checks leads to a valid model; failure at any step requires model re-specification
